name: Fruita Farmers' Market

Products.value: Local agriculture, artisan goods, fresh foods, and live entertainment

notes: The on-file website (fruitafarmersmarket.com) is a stale/outdated independent site with vague hours and an old Facebook group link (facebook.com/groups/391636954812/) with no useful content. The market is now organized by the Fruita Area Chamber of Commerce; the modern domain fruitafarmersmarket.org 301-redirects to the Chamber's official event page (https://www.fruitachamber.org/events/farmers-market), which I used as the corrected official website. Some sources refer to the market as 'Fruita Farmers and Makers Market' (rebrand), with a market-specific Instagram at instagram.com/fruita_farmersandmakers, but I used the Chamber's own GoFruita Facebook/Instagram accounts since those are directly tied to the Chamber's official event listing. One secondary source (thebusinesstimes.com) listed a different Chamber phone (970-424-5133) but the Chamber's own contact info (via search of fruitachamber.org contact page) confirms 970-858-3894, which matches gofruita.com, so I used that number. Address on file (325 E. Aspen Ave., Fruita Civic Center Park) was confirmed correct by multiple sources; not changed. ADA accessibility and certified organic status were not stated anywhere found.
